Small pink-yellow apples between the pond and the road. Access: Public.

Greenish small apple with red streaks. Nice and tart, also crisp. Good eating or pie apple. A very old tree from the historic farm that was here before it was a golf course.

The tree is on the Indian Peaks golf course, a City of Lafayette park. Best to acce

On the 7th hole of the golf course, north of the tee box. An antique apple tree from the former farmstead. Tart smallish apples, late ripening (early October). Visit at dusk and ignore crabby neighbors. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-October.

Private residence with fruit trees harvested by Community Fruit Rescue. Register as a volunteer (fruitrescue.org) if you're interested in harvesting here in the future!
